summary: Frontend-only testing of the new Home Book-Your-Transfer tab switch (Transfer vs Driver-at-disposal) and prefill of /hourly-booking via URL params. All requested flows PASS.

test_results.tab_switch_visible: PASS - mode-transfer-tab and mode-disposal-tab render above form title
test_results.default_transfer_mode: PASS - dropoff visible, hours block hidden, submit label 'SEARCH TRANSFER'
test_results.disposal_mode_toggle: PASS - dropoff hidden, home-hours-block visible with buttons home-hours-2..6, submit label switches to 'DRIVER AT DISPOSAL'
test_results.empty_pickup_validation: PASS - submit with empty pickup does not navigate (toast library uses a non-standard container so toast text was not captured, but navigation was correctly blocked)
test_results.disposal_submit_redirect: PASS - navigated to /hourly-booking?pickup=...&lat=49.0078827&lng=2.5507855&date=2026-06-15&time=14:30&hours=3 (all 6 params present and correct)
test_results.hourly_booking_prefill: PASS - hourly-pickup input prefilled with 'Aéroport de Paris-Charles de Gaulle, 95700 Roissy-en-France, France', hourly-date=2026-06-15, hourly-time=14:30, hours-3 button shows active state (green border+bg), and cars loading was triggered from passed lat/lng
test_results.regression_back_to_transfer: PASS - switching back to Transfer tab restores dropoff input and hides hours block
test_results.i18n_keys: PASS (source-verified) - Home.js contains tabTransfer/tabDisposal/hoursLabel keys in EN/FR/ES/RU/HY exactly matching spec (Transfer/Driver at disposal, Transfert/Chauffeur à disposition, Traslado/Chófer a disposición, Трансфер/Водитель в распоряжение, Տրանսֆեր/Վարորդ տրամադրության տակ). UI language dropdown click was not exercisable via the tested selectors, but code inspection confirms all 5 translations are wired to the c object rendered inside the tab labels.

critical_code_review_comments: Toast error notifications in disposal-mode validation could not be located via .Toastify__toast selector - main agent may want to verify the react-hot-toast/sonner container is actually mounted so error toasts surface (navigation is correctly blocked either way).
Home.js is 1351 lines — consider splitting the language i18n map and the booking form into separate modules for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab switch, disposal mode navigation, and /hourly-booking URL-param prefill all verified end-to-end using Google Places autocomplete on 'Charles de Gaulle Airport'. Test URL produced: /hourly-booking?pickup=A%C3%A9roport+de+Paris-Charles+de+Gaulle...&lat=49.0078827&lng=2.5507855&date=2026-06-15&time=14:30&hours=3.
